file.name: OCA\LarpingApp\Controller\ObjectsController
file.violation:
This component contains in theory 0.57 bugs.
* Calculation is based on number of operators, operands, cyclomatic complexity * See more details at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Halstead_complexity_measures * testsuites has dependency to this class.
Maybe you should check your unit tests for this class.
